prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名约第60名（2026年），为国内唯一一所211医科大学，层次稳固；抖音热度排名第78位，评价为“一般”，短视频平台曝光量中等；声誉文件2026年无天津医科大学相关负面事件，投档异常记录中亦无该校，整体舆情平稳；临床医学、口腔医学、基础医学、药学等为该校传统优势方向，虽第五轮学科评估数据未收录该校，但作为老牌医科211，医学学科实力获广泛认可。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 临床医学、口腔医学等医学类专业社会热度持续偏热，报考竞争激烈；本省2026年高考报名总人数约609800人，较2025年物理类363040人增幅显著，竞争环境明显加剧；省控线数据已纳入参考，2025年物理类本科批459分；天津医科大学位于天津市，与河北省毗邻，地域接近性高，对河北考生吸引力较强；该校在河北省招生规模逐年扩大，2026年物理类计划43人，为该校在省外的主要生源地之一。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年物理类计划仅微扩1人、本省考生总数大幅增加约68%导致竞争加剧，以及医学类专业持续高热的社会热度，在2025年基准22695名基础上预计位次继续后移；预测最低位次约23219名，区间22719–23719名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 14272 → 15960 → 21159 → 25041 → 22695, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 8400 places in the last 4 years; the 2025 baseline is about 22695 (Nursing category), with the minimum for regular categories at 18720; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 26 in both 2021 and 2022, 29 in 2023, 37 in 2024, and 42 in 2025, showing continuous expansion; the 2026 plan is 43, a small increase of 1 (+2.4%) compared to 2025, with limited expansion.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university, ranked approximately 60th in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings (2026), the only 211 medical university in China, with a stable standing; ranked 78th in Douyin popularity, rated as 'average', with moderate short video platform exposure; the reputation file for 2026 shows no negative incidents related to Tianjin Medical University, and no abnormal filing records, indicating overall stable public opinion; clinical medicine, stomatology, basic medicine, and pharmacy are its traditional strengths; although the fifth round of discipline evaluation data is not included, as a long-established 211 medical university, its medical discipline strength is widely recognized.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Medical majors such as clinical medicine and stomatology remain highly popular in society, with intense competition for applications; the total number of candidates for the 2026 provincial college entrance examination is approximately 609,800, a significant increase from the 363,040 Physics Category candidates in 2025, markedly intensifying the competitive environment; provincial control line data has been referenced, with the 2025 Physics Category undergraduate batch line at 459 points; Tianjin Medical University is located in Tianjin, adjacent to Hebei Province, with high regional proximity, making it attractive to Hebei candidates; the university's enrollment scale in Hebei Province has been expanding year by year, with a 2026 Physics Category plan of 43, making it one of the main sources of out-of-province students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend in historical rankings, the minimal expansion of only 1 place in the 2026 Physics Category plan, the significant increase of about 68% in the total number of provincial candidates leading to intensified competition, and the persistently high social popularity of medical majors, the ranking is expected to continue shifting backward from the 2025 baseline of 22695; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 23219, with a range of 22719–23719.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 22719–23719, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Clinical Medicine, Anesthesiology, Ophthalmology and Optometry Medicine, etc.), with Tier 1 majors (5+3 Integrated Programs, Stomatology, etc.) as sprint targets, and Tier 3 majors (Pharmacy, Medical Technology, Nursing, etc.) as safe backups. Rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 22719) can prioritize sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors.

prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次因护理类单独招生而大幅后移的特殊情况、2026年历史类计划缩招25%导致竞争加剧、考生总数基本持平；预测最低位次约18931名，区间18431–19431名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 3253 → 5975 → 3558 → 4175 → 22095. In 2025, due to the separate enrollment of Nursing, the ranking significantly dropped to 22095, while the minimum ranking for regular programs (Public Affairs Management) was 4558. The History Category has very few enrollment majors, leading to high volatility. The provincial History Category enrollment plan was 2 in 2021, 3 in 2022, 2 in 2023, 4 in 2024, and 4 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 3, a reduction of 1 (-25%) compared to 2025, a significant reduction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university, ranked approximately 60th in the Soft Science Ranking (2026), and the only 211 medical university in China. Its popularity on Douyin is average (ranked 78), with no negative records in reputation files, no abnormal signals in admissions, and overall stable public opinion. The university focuses on medicine, but the History Category only admits Public Affairs Management and Nursing, which are weakly related to its advantageous medical disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Nursing is relatively popular (talent shortage), while Public Affairs Management has average popularity. The estimated number of History Category examinees in Hebei Province for 2026 is about 245,140, roughly the same as 2025's 243,714. The provincial control line for History Category undergraduate batch in 2025 was 477 points. Tianjin is adjacent to Hebei, with high regional proximity, making it strongly attractive to Hebei examinees.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the special situation in 2025 where the ranking significantly dropped due to separate enrollment of Nursing, the 25% reduction in History Category enrollment plan for 2026 leading to intensified competition, and the roughly stable number of examinees, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 18931, with a range of 18431–19431.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Tianjin Medical University has very few enrollment majors in the History Category in Hebei Province (only Public Affairs Management and Nursing). With rankings within the predicted range of 18431–19431, it is recommended to focus on Nursing as the primary application direction (good employment prospects, talent shortage), while Public Affairs Management can be considered as a reach option.
